title: First Taste
overview: Toshihiko dedicated his life to only one purpose, to hunt down and destroy the Shokujinki, until the day he met Yuka.

title: Hard Farewells
overview: Toshihiko's life changed drastically when his father dies, and Yuka's true nature is revealed to him.

title: Salty New Moon Night
overview: Toshihiko escaped with Yuka and they hide themselves in a far away mansion.

title: Bitterness of the Past
overview: The story of Toshiko's father is finally revealed, as how he became the leader of the Kifūken and his relationship with Yuka's mother.

title: Woman's Hidden Flavour
overview: Kyūtarō exposes his plan to reformulate the Kifūken's organization with the help of Kazuma. Trouble arises when another member of the school gets himself involved with a Shokujinki.

title: Spicy Hot Birthday
overview: Yuka celebrates her birthday with Toshihiko, but when she tried one of his secret immobilization techniques on him, he ends up paralyzed, just when their gigantic pursuer finds them.

title: The Sweet Fragrance of Rie
overview: Rie discovers Toshihiko's hideout and goes all out trying to bring him back home. Meanwhile, Yuka has a surprising revelation.

title: Detention Tastes Like Iron
overview: Toshihiko is captured and tortured by a group of Shokujinki commanded by Yuka's former lover. But soon the Kifūken discovers their location and storm the place.

title: Sweet Dreams
overview: Once again on the run, Toshihiko and Yuka take a hike with a kind old couple. While traveling with them, they try to sort out their feelings for each other.

title: The Misfortunes of Others Are the Taste of Honey
overview: As Kyūtarō Ōba put his master plan in motion, he finally reveals his true colors.

title: The Rain Was Bitter
overview: Ōba transforms Rie in a Shokujinki and put her into a fight against Yuka. Meanwhile, Kazuma discovers the truth about his origin.

title: Coffee-Flavoured Millet Dumplings
overview: While Toshihiko tries to convince Rie's father to join his battle against Ōba, Kazuma rushes to fight him by himself.

title: Taste Has Nothing to Do with It
overview: Toshihiko and his allies struggle to stop Ōba's ambitions.
